name: Local Chess RL / Elo Ratchet
capability_target: long-horizon tactical planning, legal-action masking, sparse reward self-play, and Elo trend evidence

output_contract.diagnostics: legal move and tactical capture gates
output_contract.traces: bounded move traces for residual analysis

contamination_policy: Chess self-play and diagnostics are local. Do not train on public benchmark solutions or engine lines as answer data without a separate license and contamination review.
regression_policy: Once the tactical diagnostic is stable, preserve it as regression and rotate harder self-play opponents or longer-horizon positions.

permission_envelope.memory: benchmark-local ratings, traces, and residuals only
permission_envelope.tools: local python runner and report writers

teacher_role: Only diagnose environment, policy, or curriculum design failures. Do not provide chess benchmark answer lines or engine-distilled solution data.
